author: WhatTheFunk
body: I couldn’t agree with you more. I read the review you quoted and I was struck by how little the author took from the album. Granted, the Flobots tend to hit you in the face with their message often and with great gusto, but frankly — the guy who wrote the article compared them to Rage, and I see a lot more parallels than he seemed to draw. Zach de la Rocha was just as intense about his message, and while their music does rock, I think there’s something to be said for the Flobots’ unique take on rhythm — especially Mackenzie Roberts on viola. Maybe it’s just personal taste, but I think they’re fantastic. Even leaving aside all the work they did for Rock the Vote during the election this year (cool link: [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JOk9B1hYr4g](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JOk9B1hYr4g)) and they still come out smelling like roses. I’m looking forward to more from this outfit in the next couple years.

author: Burgo
body:
@WhatTheFunk:

Thanks for stopping by with such a great comment! Couldn’t agree with you more, really… you summed it up far better than I did in my review ;)
